action_items.action: CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) is now day 9 blocked with no resolution. No new Jira activity or Slack messages from Ciara today. Must be cleared before EOD Friday to avoid carrying a stale blocker into next week.

NEW — Review and sign off GDCU-8869 Desktop PSI geo-redirect race condition bug (Sanja Budic, High priority). Moved to In Product today at 12:48. PSI desktop audits are broken across 78+ URLs in all markets — the inline redirect fires before isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is defined by deferred scripts. Fix options are fully documented in the ticket. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Dan Smullen.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management (Sanja Budic) remains Blocked in QA. No status change since the morning report. Note: Sanja now has two concurrent items needing PM attention (GDCU-8869 In Product + GDCU-8792 Blocked). Assess whether Cloudflare blocker requires escalation to unblock.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest priority) remains In Progress. No Slack messages from Ciara today and no new Jira activity. Netlify deployment restriction flagged this morning remains unresolved. Check in before EOD on revised timeline.

NEW — Review GDCU-8862 Offer Terms Static/Scrollable (Kelvin Yee, Medium). Moved to In Product today at 10:51. Bet365 compliance requirement: scrollable T&Cs to be re-introduced for all UK operator lists, with per-brand static exclusions for Bet365 and any future brands that require it. Mike listed as stakeholder.

NEW — Review GDCU-8694 Image Carousel 500x290 (Jessica Dordevic, Medium). Moved from In Progress to In Product today at 12:50 — confirms Jessica is back after yesterday's sick day. Adds 500x290 size option to the image carousel shortcode. Mike listed as stakeholder.

CARRY FORWARD — Reply to Chloe Christie in Group DM (Mike / Chloe / Gab) re: stakeholder intake form — she asked to add a schema sub-section to the SEO field and a new page option with a dropdown for editable content blocks (2026-04-23 15:26 BST). No new Slack activity from Chloe today — confirm if her feedback is addressed.

CARRY FORWARD — Reply to Gabriel Cornoiu in Group DM re: stakeholder intake form — two open questions: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? No new Slack activity from Gab today.

CARRY FORWARD — Review and sign off GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll). In Product since 2026-04-16, day 9 with no update. Parallel to GDCU-8619 — both need Mike's sign-off to unblock Ciara.

CARRY FORWARD — Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco). In Product since 2026-04-23 12:06. No new activity today — mobile-first Betting Tips Hub still awaiting Mike's review.

INFORMATIONAL — Jessica Dordevic is confirmed back: GDCU-8694 moved to In Product at 12:50 today. No Slack activity visible but Jira confirms she's working. GDCU-8546 (Tinder Widget) and GDCU-8879 (Genesis Brand Carousel) remain In Progress.
CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog). Create the UX pre-requisite ticket or validate scope alignment with Chloe and Gab before this can be actioned. No new activity today.

needs_input.context: Day 9 blocked and In Product. No new Jira or Slack activity from Ciara today. Scope: 3 distinct grid-format operator list iterations for UK casino page (mobile-first). Blocker must be cleared today — risk of carrying into next sprint.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Desktop PSI blocked by geo-redirect race condition
needs_input.context: NEW today — moved to In Product at 12:48. High priority bug: PSI desktop audits fail across 78+ URLs in all markets because isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is undefined when the redirect script fires on DOMContentLoaded. Fix options fully documented in ticket (recommend switching to window load event). Mike's sign-off required to advance to Done.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Add Logic for Offer Terms for a Brand to be Static or Scrollable
needs_input.context: NEW today — moved to In Product at 10:51. Bet365 compliance issue requiring per-brand static/scrollable T&C logic for all UK operator lists. Mike is a named stakeholder and sign-off is required.
NEW today — moved from In Progress to In Product at 12:50. Jessica's first delivery back after sick day. Adds 500x290 size option to image carousel component for all geos. Mike listed as stakeholder.

needs_input.context: Carryover — In Product since 2026-04-16, day 9 with no update. Scope: UX improvements to CA/FR casino page oplist (card refinements, search, filter, compare). Mike's sign-off required to progress.

Carryover — moved to In Product 2026-04-23 12:06, no new activity today. Mobile-first Betting Tips Hub with live tip cards, sport navigation tabs, Matrix widget, and operator offers module. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie.
